subcodes.first_line: ...The drinking of wine is according to the text of the Most Holy Book, forbidden; for it is the cause of chronic diseases, weakeneth the nerves, and consumeth the mind
subcodes.first_line_orig: يک معنی از معانی شجره ملعونه دخانست که مکروهست و مذموم و مضرّ است و مسموم
subcodes.subjects: @alcohol and drugs; tobacco; opium, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @praise and encouragement, @Adam; Adam and Eve, @day of rest
